name: techcachet-audit-insights
description: Insight-first Jira audit and risk dashboard app.

scripts.build:ui: npm run build --prefix static/audit-insights-view && npm run build --prefix static/audit-insights-edit
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && npm run typecheck --prefix static/audit-insights-view && npm run typecheck --prefix static/audit-insights-edit
